mapper.insert: INSERT INTO department (name, description, icon, status, sort, price) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, #{icon}, #{status}, #{sort}, #{price})
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, description, icon, status, sort, create_time, price FROM department WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, name, description, icon, status, sort, create_time, price FROM department ORDER BY sort ASC, create_time DESC
SELECT id, name, description, icon, status, sort, create_time, price FROM department WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY sort ASC, create_time DESC
